capabilities.name: create_app
capabilities.description: Create and configure FastAPI application.

capabilities.name: _register_routers
capabilities.description: Register all API routers.

capabilities.name: _setup_observability
capabilities.description: Setup observability middleware.

capabilities.name: _append_debug
capabilities.description: Best-effort backend debug event sink for stall diagnosis.

capabilities.name: require_auth
capabilities.description: Require bearer auth when backend token is configured.

capabilities.name: require_permission
capabilities.description: Factory for permission-checking dependency.

capabilities.name: setup_exception_handlers
capabilities.description: Register all exception handlers with the FastAPI app.

capabilities.name: AuditContextMiddleware
capabilities.description: Middleware for establishing unified audit context from request headers.

methods.name: _should_setup_context
methods.doc: Check if path should have audit context setup.

methods.name: _extract_or_generate_ids
methods.doc: Extract IDs from headers or generate if not present.

capabilities.name: _generate_trace_id
capabilities.description: Generate a standardized trace_id (16-char hex).

capabilities.name: _generate_run_id
capabilities.description: Generate a run_id (UUID format).

capabilities.name: _generate_task_id
capabilities.description: Generate a task_id (UUID format).

capabilities.name: get_audit_context_middleware
capabilities.description: Factory function to create audit context middleware with config from environment.

capabilities.name: RequestLoggingMiddleware
capabilities.description: Middleware for logging HTTP requests and responses.

methods.name: _should_log_path
methods.doc: Check if path should be logged.

methods.name: _mask_sensitive_headers
methods.doc: Mask sensitive header values.

methods.name: _get_client_ip
methods.doc: Extract client IP from request.

methods.name: _format_log_entry
methods.doc: Format structured log entry.

capabilities.name: get_logging_middleware
capabilities.description: Factory function to create logging middleware with config from environment.

capabilities.name: HistogramBucket
capabilities.description: Histogram bucket for latency tracking.

capabilities.name: RequestMetrics
capabilities.description: Metrics for a specific route/method combination.

capabilities.name: MetricsCollector
capabilities.description: Thread-safe metrics collector.

methods.name: record_request
methods.doc: Record a completed request.

methods.name: start_request
methods.doc: Track in-flight request start.

methods.name: get_prometheus_format
methods.doc: Export metrics in Prometheus format.

methods.name: reset
methods.doc: Reset all metrics.

capabilities.name: MetricsMiddleware
capabilities.description: Middleware for collecting Prometheus metrics.

methods.name: _should_collect
methods.doc: Check if path should be tracked.

methods.name: _normalize_path
methods.doc: Normalize path for metric labeling (remove IDs).

capabilities.name: get_metrics_collector
capabilities.description: Get the global metrics collector.

capabilities.name: reset_metrics_for_testing
capabilities.description: Reset global metrics collector for test isolation.

capabilities.name: get_metrics_middleware
capabilities.description: Factory function to create metrics middleware.

capabilities.name: RateLimitEntry
capabilities.description: Token-bucket rate limit tracking entry for a client.

capabilities.name: RateLimitStore
capabilities.description: Thread-safe token-bucket store for rate limit tracking.

methods.name: _get_client_key
methods.doc: Generate unique key for client identification.

methods.name: _cleanup_old_entries
methods.doc: Remove expired entries to prevent memory growth.

methods.name: _replenish_tokens
methods.doc: Add tokens based on elapsed time since last update.

methods.name: check_rate_limit
methods.doc: Token-bucket rate limit check.

methods.name: reset
methods.doc: Reset rate limit for a client or all clients.

capabilities.name: RateLimitMiddleware
capabilities.description: Rate limiting middleware for FastAPI.

capabilities.name: get_rate_limit_middleware
capabilities.description: Factory function to create rate limit middleware with config from environment.

capabilities.name: RBACMiddleware
capabilities.description: ASGI middleware that initializes a least-privileged role projection.

capabilities.name: _role_from_value
capabilities.description: Parse a role only when it exactly matches a known server role.

capabilities.name: _role_values
capabilities.description: Normalize trusted metadata role claims into an iterable tuple.

capabilities.name: role_from_auth_context
capabilities.description: Resolve the effective role from server-bound auth metadata.

capabilities.name: extract_role_from_request
capabilities.description: Return the server-bound role for a request.

capabilities.name: require_role
capabilities.description: Dependency factory that enforces route-level role membership.

capabilities.name: StructuredHTTPException
capabilities.description: HTTPException that carries structured {code, message, details} data.

methods.name: to_dict
methods.doc: Return the ADR-003 structured error dict.

capabilities.name: required_ready_roles
capabilities.description: Return the list of roles that must pass LLM-readiness checks.

capabilities.name: ensure_required_roles_ready
capabilities.description: Raise 409 if any of the required roles fail the LLM-readiness check.

capabilities.name: structured_error_response
capabilities.description: Return a JSONResponse with unified {code, message, details} format.

capabilities.name: SSEJetStreamConsumer
capabilities.description: SSE consumer that reads from JetStream for remote event streaming.

methods.name: __init__
methods.doc: Initialize SSE JetStream consumer.

methods.name: is_connected
methods.doc: Check if consumer is connected.

capabilities.name: _get_replay_secret
capabilities.description: Get or generate replay protection secret.

capabilities.name: validate_subject
capabilities.description: Validate JetStream subject pattern to prevent injection.

capabilities.name: validate_workspace_key
capabilities.description: Validate workspace key format.

capabilities.name: validate_payload_size
capabilities.description: Validate payload size against configured limits.

capabilities.name: validate_event_timestamp
capabilities.description: Validate event timestamp is within acceptable replay window.

capabilities.name: generate_event_signature
capabilities.description: Generate HMAC signature for event integrity verification.

capabilities.name: verify_event_signature
capabilities.description: Verify HMAC signature of event.

capabilities.name: create_sse_response
capabilities.description: Wrap an SSE async generator into a properly-configured ``StreamingResponse``.

capabilities.name: create_sse_jetstream_consumer
capabilities.description: Factory function to create SSE JetStream consumer with proper configuration.

capabilities.name: create_sse_response_from_jetstream
capabilities.description: Create SSE response from JetStream consumer.
